title: Data Analyst (Remote)
description:
About Joveo:
Every company says they're "AI-first." We actually are. Joveo's recruitment
advertising platform processes millions of hiring decisions through machine
learning, real-time bidding, and predictive analytics — helping the world's
largest employers find the right people, faster and fairer. But we're not
done. Not even close.
Role:
Data Analyst
Location:
Remote
Role Overview:
We are hiring a Data Analyst to transform Joveo's operational and product
data into insights that drive smarter decisions across the business. You
will be the bridge between raw data and strategic clarity — building
dashboards, conducting analyses, and answering the questions that matter.
Key Responsibilities:
- Analyze large datasets to identify trends, anomalies, and business opportunities
- Build and maintain dashboards and reports for product, operations, and leadership teams
- Define and track KPIs across business functions and product areas
- Collaborate with engineers to ensure data quality and pipeline reliability
- Design and evaluate A/B tests and present findings with statistical rigor
- Translate complex data findings into clear, actionable business narratives
Required Skills & Qualifications:
- Strong proficiency in SQL for complex data querying and analysis
- Experience with BI tools such as Looker, Tableau, Power BI, or Metabase
- Proficiency in Python or R for data analysis and visualization
- Solid understanding of statistical concepts and analytical methods
- Experience working with large datasets in cloud warehouses (BigQuery, Redshift, or Snowflake)
- Excellent communication skills — ability to tell stories with data
Equal Opportunity Employer:
Joveo is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to building an
inclusive workplace and welcome applications from all qualified individuals
regardless of race, color, ethnicity, nationality, gender, gender identity
or expression, sexual orientation, age, religion, disability, marital status,
or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. All hiring decisions
are made solely on the basis of qualifications, skills, and demonstrated
ability.
If your dream job is one that doesn't fit neatly into a job title — apply.
Joveo. Where AI meets the future of work.
